zh.Swaffham Bulbeck, Cambridgeshire, Englan: 英國坎布利其爾斯瓦福哈姆 布爾貝可
zh.Freiston, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾福萊斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil de Longchamps於大約1222年出生在英國林可爾史爾福萊斯頓時，她的父親Roger de Longchamps II49歲，母親Simone Du Bois39歲。她和John de Vaux至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1261年6月10日在英國諾福爾可享年40歲。

zh-hans.Swaffham Bulbeck, Cambridgeshire, Englan: 英国坎布利其爾斯瓦福哈姆 布爾貝可
zh-hans.Freiston, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾福萊斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil de Longchamps于大约1222年出生在英国林可爾史爾福萊斯頓时，她的父亲Roger de Longchamps II49岁，母亲Simone Du Bois39岁。她和John de Vaux至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1261年6月10日在英国諾福爾可享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla

It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil de Longchamps was born about 1222, in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Roger de Longchamps II, was 49 and her mother, Simone Du Bois, was 39. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with John de Vaux. She died on 10 June 1261, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil de Longchamps est née environ 1222, à Freiston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Longchamps II, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Simone Du Bois, avait 39 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec John de Vaux. Elle est décédée le 10 juin 1261, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil de Longchamps um 1222 in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Longchamps II 49 und ihre Mutter Simone Du Bois 39. Sie hatte mit John de Vaux mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Juni 1261 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Longchamps è nata il circa 1222 nel Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Roger de Longchamps II, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Simone Du Bois, aveva 39 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con John de Vaux. Morì il 10 giugno 1261, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.Swaffham Bulbeck, Cambridgeshire, Englan: イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアスワフハム ブルベック
ja.Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルク

ja.Dalston Barony, Pentney, Norfolk, Englan: イギリスノーフォルクペントニー
ja.Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイア
ja.Aquitaine, France: フランスアクイティアイン
ja.lifeSummary: Sybil de Longchampsが約1222年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフレイストンで生まれた時，父Roger de Longchamps IIは49歳，母Simone Du Boisは39歳であった。彼女はJohn de Vauxとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1261年6月10日にイギリスノーフォルクで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil de Longchamps(이)가 대략 1222년 영국 링코실르 프레이스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Longchamps II(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Simone Du Bois(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 John de Vaux(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1261년 6월 10일 영국 노르폴크에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Longchamps nasceu aproximadamente 1222, em Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Longchamps II, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Simone Du Bois, tinha 39 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com John de Vaux. Ela faleceu em 10 de junho de 1261, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil de Longchamps родилась около 1222 г. в местности фристон, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Longchamps II было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Simone Du Bois, 39. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от John de Vaux. Она умерла 10 июня 1261 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybil de Longchamps nació aproximadamente 1222, en Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Longchamps II, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Simone Du Bois, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con John de Vaux. Murió el 10 de junio de 1261, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
